untranslatable_reason: Head-and-shoulders bottom requires precise identification of three distinct troughs with specific volume diminishment pattern across multiple bars. Available indicators cannot track: (1) exact trough identification and sequencing (left shoulder < head < right shoulder relative positioning), (2) volume decreasing progressively across three specific points, (3) the neckline level as a dynamic support line connecting two peaks. Pattern detection would require multi-bar lookback logic and custom peak/trough detection not available in provided indicator set.
